title: SkyGrid
description: This isn't the "normal" skygrid where all the blocks are random this is the vanilla type version.
body:
# 🌍️ SkyGrid
SkyGrid is a mod that generates a unique world type where blocks are arranged in a grid pattern suspended in the void. Navigate between floating blocks, gather resources, and survive in this challenging dimension where every block counts.

## ❓️ FAQ
**Q:** Will you backport or fix X version?

**A:** If an [issue request](https://github.com/Ironics-Side-Projects/SkyGrid/issues) is created I will.

## Features
- Configurable grid spacing and patterns
- Optimized performance for large-scale generation
- Support for both Fabric and Quilt loaders
- Non random blocks fully vanilla generation
